arts.sum: This season Guehi has captained a struggling Palace side, playing 22 games in all competitions and remaining one of the stand-out performers for Oliver Glasner's men.

arts.ttl: £18m Premier League star now wants Anfield move with Liverpool ready to negotiate - journalist
‘Almost complete’ – Optimism over signing Liverpool player, aiming for January completion
arts.sum: Sunday’s edition of AS sounds very confident, even approaching cocky, about Trent Alexander-Arnold moving to Real Madrid. The Liverpool player has just months left on his contract at Anfield and will therefore be able to sign a pre-contract agreement with a foreign club from January onwards. arts.ttl: “It’s his character” – West Ham player’s entourage gives his side on Julen Lopetegui clash
arts.sum: Saturday November 30th saw West Ham battered 5-2 at home by Arsenal. Unusually all the goals were scored in the first half and that meant a tense Hammers dressing room at half time. After the match there were reports Jean-Clair Todibo had lost his temper and had a clash with manager Julen Lopetegui. arts.ttl: Napoli make contact for Chiesa loan from Liverpool
arts.sum: Federico Chiesa's struggles to establish himself at Liverpool have opened the door for a potential return to Italy, with Napoli emerging as a strong contender for his signature. Despite Liverpool's impressive form in both the Premier League and Champions League under Arne Slot, Chiesa has found playing time hard to come by, featuring in just four matches for a total of 123 minutes this season.
